title: Fatty Pudding Pots
description: A rich dessert made with cocoa and Canadian pudding, perfect for a sweet treat.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together pudding mix and fatty milk.
Add cocoa powder, sugar, and vanilla extract to the saucepan.
Whisk until well combined and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2 minutes, or until the mixture thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in a pinch of salt.
Pour the pudding mixture into individual serving cups or ramekins.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or until set.
Top with whipped cream, if desired.
